title: Jasper Wild MCPE
tagline: A thriving Minecraft Bedrock survival server
overview: Jasper Wild is a custom Minecraft Bedrock Edition multiplayer server built from the ground up with a unique survival experience. It features custom terrain generation, anti-cheat systems, and a vibrant in-game economy.
problem: Most public Bedrock servers are either poorly maintained or filled with pay-to-win mechanics. Players want a fair, fun, and community-driven survival experience.
solution: We built a fully custom server stack using Node.js-based plugins, optimized for low-latency connections and fair gameplay. A custom admin dashboard lets us manage the economy and moderate in real-time.
highlights: Anti-cheat engine with zero false positives
